scripts.check:docs: pnpm build:core && pnpm --filter lism-docs exec astro check
scripts.merge:dev: git checkout main && git merge dev
scripts.merge:m2d: git checkout dev && git merge main
scripts.deploy: sh -c 'echo "本当に main にマージしてデプロイしますか？ (yes/no)"; read ans; if [ "$ans" = "yes" ]; then echo "memo: lastmod更新 → mainにマージ → push → devに戻る"; pnpm --filter lism-docs generate:lastmod && git add apps/docs/lastmod-map.json && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "chore: lastmod-map.json を更新" && git checkout main && git merge dev && git push origin main && git checkout dev && git push origin dev; else echo "デプロイを中止しました"; fi'
scripts.publish:core: pnpm run build:core && pnpm --filter lism-css publish
scripts.publish:ui: pnpm run build:ui && pnpm --filter @lism-css/ui publish --access public
scripts.publish:mcp: pnpm run build:mcp && pnpm --filter @lism-css/mcp publish --access public
scripts.publish:cli: pnpm run build:cli && pnpm --filter @lism-css/cli publish --access public --no-git-checks && pnpm --filter create-lism publish --access public --no-git-checks
